name: Red Velvet Cake Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Add the butter and shortening to a large mixing bowl.
3. Gradually add the confectioners sugar, stirring continuously until combined.
4. Mix in the flour and sweet milk until the icing reaches a smooth consistency.
5. Beat on high speed for approximately 15-20 minutes or until thickened.
